Configuration for a Pebble SDK package with metadata and target platform details.

# Purpose
This JSON metadata file defines the configuration for a Pebble package project. It includes placeholders for the project name and SDK version, specifies the author as `MakeAwesomeHappen`, and sets the version to `1.0.0`. The file lists `dist.zip` as the included file and tags the project with the keyword `pebble-package`. The `pebble` object details the project type as `package`, the SDK version, and the target platforms, which are `aplite`, `basalt`, `chalk`, and `diorite`. The `resources` section is present but currently does not include any media resources.
